description: The 'Ndrina Abbruzzese is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cassano allo Ionio and Corigliano Calabro, in the province of Cosenza, Italy. It emerged in the late 1990s, initially involved in armored car robberies, and is composed of Romani individuals. The group has been involved in a war with other 'ndrine in Cosenza from 1999 to 2001 and has been targeted in several police operations, including Timpone Rosso (2009) and Gentleman (2015).
